accessibility_info.hotline_hours: Daily, 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM (festival days) and 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (week prior)
accessibility_info.description: Our Accessibility Hotline is available for questions about accessible seating, mobility assistance, ASL interpretation, service animal areas, and other accommodations. Call the number above during hotline hours, or use the contact form below to reach the Accessibility Team by email.

policy_sections.title: Refunds & Exchanges
policy_sections.content_html:
Refunds & Exchanges

All festival ticket sales are final except as required by law or explicitly stated in this policy. In certain circumstances, such as event cancellation or significant date changes, you may be eligible for a refund or exchange.

  • Standard Tickets: Non-refundable and non-transferable after purchase, unless the festival is cancelled.
  • 3-Day Passes: May be exchanged for a different ticket tier within 7 days of purchase, subject to availability and price differences.
  • Service Fees: Service and processing fees are non-refundable.

For full details and step-by-step instructions on requesting a refund or exchange, please review the information on this page or contact our support team.

View ticket options

policy_sections.title: Privacy Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Privacy Policy

We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have regarding your information.

We collect information you provide directly (such as when purchasing tickets or signing up for the newsletter) and information collected automatically (such as device and usage data). We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

policy_sections.title: Terms of Use
policy_sections.content_html:
Terms of Use

By using this website and attending the festival, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before purchasing tickets or accessing any services.

These terms cover acceptable behavior, prohibited activities, intellectual property rights, and limitations of liability related to your use of the site and participation in the event.

policy_sections.title: Code of Conduct
policy_sections.content_html:
Code of Conduct

The festival is dedicated to providing a safe, inclusive environment for all attendees, artists, and staff. Harassment, discrimination, or abusive behavior will not be tolerated.

Guests are expected to follow all instructions from staff and security, respect personal space, and report any concerns to the nearest festival representative or the Info Booth.

policy_sections.title: Accessibility Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Accessibility Policy

We are committed to making the festival accessible to as many guests as possible. This section describes available accommodations, including accessible viewing areas, mobility assistance, and communication support services.

For additional questions or requests, please visit the Accessibility section on the Info page or contact our Accessibility Hotline.

faq_questions.question: Can I get a refund for my festival tickets?
faq_questions.answer_html:
All standard ticket sales are final, but there are limited situations where you may qualify for a refund or exchange.

  • If the entire festival is cancelled, you will be offered a refund or the option to transfer your ticket to a future edition.
  • 3-Day passes may be exchanged for another available ticket tier within 7 days of purchase, subject to price differences.
  • Service and processing fees are non-refundable.

For full details, please review our Full ticket refund policy.

faq_questions.question: What happens if the festival is postponed or cancelled?
faq_questions.answer_html:
If the festival is postponed, your tickets will automatically be honored for the rescheduled dates. If you cannot attend the new dates, you may request a refund during a published request window.

If the festival is cancelled, you will be eligible for a refund of the face value of your ticket in accordance with our Full ticket refund policy. Service fees are typically non-refundable.

faq_questions.question: What types of passes are available?
faq_questions.answer_html:
We offer several ticket options so you can build the weekend that works for you:

  • Single-Day Passes: Choose Friday, Saturday, or Sunday only.
  • 3-Day General Admission: Access to all three festival days.
  • 3-Day GA+ and VIP: Enhanced viewing areas and additional benefits.
  • Parking and Camping Passes: Optional add-ons for vehicles and overnight camping.

You can compare all current options on the Tickets page.

faq_questions.question: How do I access my mobile tickets at the gate?
faq_questions.answer_html:
All tickets are delivered electronically. After purchase, you will receive a confirmation email with a link to your mobile tickets.

  1. Open the confirmation email on your smartphone.
  2. Tap the View Tickets button to open your secure ticket wallet.
  3. Add your passes to your preferred mobile wallet if available.
  4. Have your QR codes ready to scan at the entrance.

You can also access your tickets anytime from the My Tickets section of your account.

faq_questions.question: Is there accessible seating near the Main Stage?
faq_questions.answer_html:
Yes. The Main Stage offers designated accessible viewing areas with companion seating. These areas are clearly marked on the festival map and are located with line-of-sight to the stage and nearby accessible restrooms.

Our Accessibility Team can help you locate these areas and answer questions about seating, sightlines, and assisted services. For personalized support, please visit the Accessibility section or call our Accessibility Hotline at +1 (555) 274-2026.

If you prefer to reach us by email, use the form in the Accessibility Contact section.

faq_questions.question: Are service animals allowed at the festival?
faq_questions.answer_html:
Trained service animals are welcome throughout the festival grounds. Emotional support animals, comfort animals, and pets are not permitted.

  • Service animals must remain on a leash or harness at all times.
  • Relief areas are marked on the festival map and near the Accessibility Info point.
  • If you have questions about bringing a service animal, please contact the Accessibility Team in advance.

faq_questions.question: What are my options for parking and travel to the festival?
faq_questions.answer_html:
We recommend arriving by public transit, rideshare, or bike whenever possible. Limited on-site parking is available with a pre-purchased Parking Pass.

  • On-site Parking: Paid lots open 2 hours before gates each day.
  • Rideshare: Dedicated pick-up and drop-off zones near the South Entrance.
  • Bikes: Free bike parking racks near the North Entrance.

Full directions and transit information are available in the About the Festival section.

faq_questions.question: Can I leave and re-enter the festival during the day?
faq_questions.answer_html:
Same-day re-entry is allowed for 3-Day passes and VIP guests. Single-day pass holders may exit and re-enter only once per day.

You must scan out when leaving and scan your valid wristband and ticket again when returning. Re-entry is subject to all standard security checks.

faq_questions.question: What behavior is expected of guests during the festival?
faq_questions.answer_html:
We are committed to providing a safe and inclusive environment for everyone. Harassment, discrimination, violence, and illegal activity are strictly prohibited.

All attendees must follow staff instructions and respect personal boundaries. For full details, please review our Code of Conduct.

faq_questions.question: Can I choose which genres and days I get newsletter updates about?
faq_questions.answer_html:
Yes. When you sign up for the newsletter, you can select your preferred genres (such as Electronic, Rock, or Hip-Hop) and the festival days you care about (Friday, Saturday, Sunday).

You can change these preferences at any time by clicking the Manage Preferences link at the bottom of any festival email or by revisiting the Newsletter Signup section on the homepage.

artists.name: Festival Welcome Team
artists.bio: A rotating crew of festival hosts, local DJs, and MCs who open the gates each day with announcements, music highlights, and crowd warm-ups.

artists.name: The Shorelines
artists.bio: The Shorelines blend coastal indie rock with singable hooks and driving rhythms, perfect for kicking off a summer festival weekend.

artists.name: Riverside Collective
artists.bio: An acoustic folk ensemble known for close harmonies, fiddle leads, and relaxed riverside vibes.

artists.name: Forest Lights
artists.bio: Forest Lights craft immersive electronic journeys shaped by organic textures, field recordings, and layered synth lines.

artists.name: Skyline Pulse
artists.bio: Skyline Pulse fuse high-energy electronic beats with live drums and cinematic visuals, lighting up late-night festival crowds worldwide.

artists.name: Coastal Frames
artists.bio: Coastal Frames weave shimmering guitars and airy vocals into sun-drenched indie soundscapes.

artists.name: Thunder Hearts
artists.bio: Thunder Hearts deliver big-chorus rock anthems that are built for outdoor stages and sunset singalongs.

artists.name: Midnight Echoes
artists.bio: Crunchy guitars, melodic leads, and a touch of nostalgia define Midnight Echoes’ energetic rock sets.

artists.name: Crimson Valley
artists.bio: Crimson Valley specialize in soaring festival rock, blending modern production with classic influences.

artists.name: Starlight Riot
artists.bio: Starlight Riot bring a high-octane rock show packed with pyrotechnics, big hooks, and crowd-wide chants.

artists.name: Midnight Orbit
artists.bio: Midnight Orbit guide late-night crowds through deep electronic explorations, from atmospheric builds to heavy drops.

artists.name: Brightside Family Band
artists.bio: Brightside Family Band perform interactive, family-friendly pop arrangements with plenty of chances for kids to sing along.

artists.name: Indie Sun
artists.bio: Indie Sun craft warm, harmony-rich indie songs that feel tailor-made for lazy Sunday afternoons.

artists.name: Festival Singalong Choir
artists.bio: A rotating collective of vocalists and players leading the crowd through rock and pop classics on the final day.

artists.name: River Flow
artists.bio: River Flow combine live instrumentation, soulful hooks, and nimble wordplay for a dynamic hip-hop performance.

artists.name: Neon Drift
artists.bio: Neon Drift close out the festival with a kaleidoscopic electronic finale, blending melodic drops, lasers, and surprise guests.
